# Openapi2kotlin 0.17.0 Documentation

> Version-pinned documentation for openapi2kotlin 0.17.0. Use this file when you need links and structured data for this exact release.

Version: 0.17.0
Latest stable version: 0.17.0

## Start Here
- Versioned docs: https://openapi2kotlin.dev/0.17.0
- Installation: https://openapi2kotlin.dev/0.17.0#installation
- AI / LLMs: https://openapi2kotlin.dev/0.17.0#llms
- Under the Hood: https://openapi2kotlin.dev/0.17.0#under-the-hood
- API Reference: https://openapi2kotlin.dev/0.17.0#api-reference

## Framework Targets
- Client libraries: Ktor, Http4k, RestClient
- Server libraries: Ktor, Http4k, Spring

## How It Works

Examples in this section are extracted from generated demo files for version 0.17.0.

Minimal OpenAPI excerpt based on the petstore3 demo `/pet` POST route; XML metadata is omitted:

```yaml
openapi: 3.0.4
info:
  title: Swagger Petstore - OpenAPI 3.0
  description: |-
    This is a sample Pet Store Server based on the OpenAPI 3.0 specification.  You can find out more about
    Swagger at [https://swagger.io](https://swagger.io). In the third iteration of the pet store, we've switched to the design first approach!
    You can now help us improve the API whether it's by making changes to the definition itself or to the code.
    That way, with time, we can improve the API in general, and expose some of the new features in OAS3.

    Some useful links:
    - [The Pet Store repository](https://github.com/swagger-api/swagger-petstore)
    - [The source API definition for the Pet Store](https://github.com/swagger-api/swagger-petstore/blob/master/src/main/resources/openapi.yaml)
  termsOfService: https://swagger.io/terms/
  contact:
    email: apiteam@swagger.io
  license:
    name: Apache 2.0
    url: https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0.html
  version: 1.0.12
paths:
  /pet:
    post:
      tags:
        - pet
      summary: Add a new pet to the store.
      description: Add a new pet to the store.
      operationId: addPet
      requestBody:
        description: Create a new pet in the store
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: '#/components/schemas/Pet'
        required: true
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Successful operation
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/Pet'
        '400':
          description: Invalid input
        '422':
          description: Validation exception
        default:
          description: Unexpected error
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/Error"
      security:
        - petstore_auth:
            - write:pets
            - read:pets
components:
  schemas:
    Pet:
      required:
        - name
        - photoUrls
      type: object
      properties:
        id:
          type: integer
          format: int64
          example: 10
        name:
          type: string
          example: doggie
        category:
          $ref: '#/components/schemas/Category'
        photoUrls:
          type: array
          items:
            type: string
        tags:
          type: array
          items:
            $ref: '#/components/schemas/Tag'
        status:
          type: string
          description: pet status in the store
          enum:
            - available
            - pending
            - sold
    Error:
      type: object
      properties:
        code:
          type: string
        message:
          type: string
      required:
        - code
        - message
```

Generated sources land under `build/generated/src/main/kotlin`.

### Generated Models

`demo/0.17.0/petstore3/client/openapi2kotlin-demo-0.17.0-petstore3-client-ktor/build/generated/src/main/kotlin/dev/openapi2kotlin/demo/model/Pet.kt`:

```kotlin
package dev.openapi2kotlin.demo.model

import kotlinx.serialization.Serializable
import kotlin.Long
import kotlin.String
import kotlin.collections.List

@Serializable
data class Pet(
    val id: Long? = null,
    val name: String,
    val category: Category? = null,
    val photoUrls: List<String>,
    val tags: List<Tag>? = null,
    /**
     * pet status in the store
     */
    val status: String? = null,
)
```

`demo/0.17.0/petstore3/client/openapi2kotlin-demo-0.17.0-petstore3-client-ktor/build/generated/src/main/kotlin/dev/openapi2kotlin/demo/model/Error.kt`:

```kotlin
package dev.openapi2kotlin.demo.model

import kotlinx.serialization.Serializable
import kotlin.String

@Serializable
data class Error(
    val code: String,
    val message: String,
)
```

### Generated Clients

#### Ktor Client

`demo/0.17.0/petstore3/client/openapi2kotlin-demo-0.17.0-petstore3-client-ktor/build/generated/src/main/kotlin/dev/openapi2kotlin/demo/client/PetApi.kt` `createPet` excerpt:

```kotlin
    /**
     * Add a new pet to the store.
     *
     * Add a new pet to the store.
     */
    suspend fun createPet(body: Pet): Pet
```

`demo/0.17.0/petstore3/client/openapi2kotlin-demo-0.17.0-petstore3-client-ktor/build/generated/src/main/kotlin/dev/openapi2kotlin/demo/client/PetApiImpl.kt` `createPet` excerpt:

```kotlin
    override suspend fun createPet(body: Pet): Pet = client.post {
        url {
            appendPathSegments("pet")
        }
        setBody(body)
    }.body<Pet>()
```

#### Http4k Client

`demo/0.17.0/petstore3/client/openapi2kotlin-demo-0.17.0-petstore3-client-http4k/build/generated/src/main/kotlin/dev/openapi2kotlin/demo/client/PetApi.kt` `createPet` excerpt:

```kotlin
    /**
     * Add a new pet to the store.
     *
     * Add a new pet to the store.
     */
    fun createPet(body: Pet): Pet
```

`demo/0.17.0/petstore3/client/openapi2kotlin-demo-0.17.0-petstore3-client-http4k/build/generated/src/main/kotlin/dev/openapi2kotlin/demo/client/PetApiImpl.kt` `createPet` excerpt:

```kotlin
    override fun createPet(body: Pet): Pet {
        val response = createPetWithHttpInfo(body)
        val lens = Body.auto<Pet>().toLens()
        return lens(response)
    }
```

#### RestClient Client

`demo/0.17.0/petstore3/client/openapi2kotlin-demo-0.17.0-petstore3-client-restclient/build/generated/src/main/kotlin/dev/openapi2kotlin/demo/client/PetApi.kt` `createPet` excerpt:

```kotlin
    /**
     * Add a new pet to the store.
     *
     * Add a new pet to the store.
     */
    fun createPet(body: Pet): Pet
```

`demo/0.17.0/petstore3/client/openapi2kotlin-demo-0.17.0-petstore3-client-restclient/build/generated/src/main/kotlin/dev/openapi2kotlin/demo/client/PetApiImpl.kt` `createPet` excerpt:

```kotlin
    override fun createPet(body: Pet): Pet = requireNotNull(createPetRequest(body).body(object : ParameterizedTypeReference<Pet>() {})) { "Expected response body for createPet" }
```

### Generated Servers

#### Ktor Server

`demo/0.17.0/petstore3/server/openapi2kotlin-demo-0.17.0-petstore3-server-ktor/build/generated/src/main/kotlin/dev/openapi2kotlin/demo/server/PetApi.kt` `createPet` excerpt:

```kotlin
    /**
     * Add a new pet to the store.
     *
     * Add a new pet to the store.
     */
    suspend fun createPet(body: Pet): Pet
```

`demo/0.17.0/petstore3/server/openapi2kotlin-demo-0.17.0-petstore3-server-ktor/build/generated/src/main/kotlin/dev/openapi2kotlin/demo/server/PetRoutes.kt` `POST /pet` route excerpt:

```kotlin
        post {
            val body = call.receive<Pet>()
            val result = api.createPet(body)
            call.respond(HttpStatusCode.OK, result)
        }
```

#### Http4k Server

`demo/0.17.0/petstore3/server/openapi2kotlin-demo-0.17.0-petstore3-server-http4k/build/generated/src/main/kotlin/dev/openapi2kotlin/demo/server/PetApi.kt` `createPet` excerpt:

```kotlin
    /**
     * Add a new pet to the store.
     *
     * Add a new pet to the store.
     */
    fun createPet(body: Pet): Pet
```

`demo/0.17.0/petstore3/server/openapi2kotlin-demo-0.17.0-petstore3-server-http4k/build/generated/src/main/kotlin/dev/openapi2kotlin/demo/server/PetRoutes.kt` `POST /pet` route excerpt:

```kotlin
    "/pet" bind org.http4k.core.Method.POST to { request ->
        val body = Body.auto<Pet>().toLens()(request)
        return@to api.createPetWithHttpInfo(body)
    },
```

#### Spring Server

`demo/0.17.0/petstore3/server/openapi2kotlin-demo-0.17.0-petstore3-server-spring/build/generated/src/main/kotlin/dev/openapi2kotlin/demo/server/PetApi.kt` `createPet` excerpt:

```kotlin
    /**
     * Add a new pet to the store.
     *
     * Add a new pet to the store.
     */
    @Operation(
        summary = "Add a new pet to the store.",
        operationId = "addPet",
        description = "Add a new pet to the store.",
        tags = ["pet"],
        responses = [
              ResponsesApiResponseAnnotation(responseCode = "default", description = "Response", content = [Content(schema = Schema(implementation = Error::class))]),
              ResponsesApiResponseAnnotation(responseCode = "200", description = "Success", content = [Content(schema = Schema(implementation = Pet::class))]),
              ResponsesApiResponseAnnotation(responseCode = "400", description = "Bad Request"),
              ResponsesApiResponseAnnotation(responseCode = "422", description = "Response")
            ],
    )
    @PostMapping(value = ["/pet"])
    fun createPet(@ParametersRequestBodyAnnotation(required = true, content = [Content(schema = Schema(implementation = Pet::class))]) @AnnotationRequestBodyAnnotation @Valid body: Pet): ResponseEntity<Pet>
```

## Configuration Options

### `inputSpec`

- Required: true
- Default: -
- Values: -
- Description:
```kotlin
Path to OpenAPI YAML or JSON specification, e.g. "$projectDir/src/main/resources/openapi.yaml".
```

### `outputDir`

- Required: true
- Default: -
- Values: -
- Description:
```kotlin
Root directory for generated Kotlin sources, e.g.
layout.buildDirectory.dir("generated/src/main/kotlin").get().asFile.path.
```

### `enabled`

- Required: false
- Default: true
- Values: true, false
- Description: Enables or disables code generation for the current Gradle run.

### `model.packageName`

- Required: false
- Default: "dev.openapi2kotlin.model"
- Values: -
- Description: Package name for generated model classes.

### `model.serialization`

- Required: false
- Default: Ktor -> KotlinX, Http4k -> KotlinX, Server Spring -> Jackson, Client RestClient -> Jackson
- Values: KotlinX, Jackson
- Description: Serialization annotation family for generated model classes.

### `model.validation`

- Required: false
- Default: None
- Values: None, Jakarta, JavaX
- Description: Validation annotations namespace used in generated models.

### `model.double2BigDecimal`

- Required: false
- Default: false
- Values: true, false
- Description: Maps OpenAPI number/double to BigDecimal instead of Double.

### `model.float2BigDecimal`

- Required: false
- Default: false
- Values: true, false
- Description: Maps OpenAPI number/float to BigDecimal instead of Float.

### `model.integer2Long`

- Required: false
- Default: true
- Values: true, false
- Description: Maps OpenAPI integer to Long instead of Int.

### `client.packageName`

- Required: false
- Default: "dev.openapi2kotlin.client"
- Values: -
- Description: Base package for generated API classes.

### `client.library`

- Required: true
- Default: -
- Values: Ktor, Http4k, RestClient
- Description: Target HTTP client library used by generated client API.

### `client.basePathVar`

- Required: false
- Default: "basePath"
- Values: -
- Description:
```kotlin
Uses the first OpenAPI server variable matching `basePathVar` when it has a default value, e.g.

servers:
  - url: '/{basePath}'
    variables:
      basePath:
        default: 'v5/'
```

### `client.methodNameSingularized`

- Required: false
- Default: true
- Values: true, false
- Description: Singularizes method names for single-resource endpoints, e.g. `retrieveQuote`.

### `client.methodNamePluralized`

- Required: false
- Default: true
- Values: true, false
- Description: Pluralizes method names for collection endpoints, e.g. `listQuotes`.

### `client.methodNameFromOperationId`

- Required: false
- Default: false
- Values: true, false
- Description: Derives method names from OpenAPI `operationId` instead of URL path.

### `server.packageName`

- Required: false
- Default: "dev.openapi2kotlin.server"
- Values: -
- Description: Base package for generated API classes.

### `server.library`

- Required: true
- Default: -
- Values: Ktor, Http4k, Spring
- Description: Target server framework used by generated server API.

### `server.swagger`

- Required: false
- Default: Ktor -> false, Http4k -> false, Spring -> true
- Values: true, false
- Description: Enables generated Swagger/OpenAPI annotations.

### `server.basePathVar`

- Required: false
- Default: "basePath"
- Values: -
- Description:
```kotlin
Uses the first OpenAPI server variable matching `basePathVar` when it has a default value, e.g.

servers:
  - url: '/{basePath}'
    variables:
      basePath:
        default: 'v5/'
```

### `server.methodNameSingularized`

- Required: false
- Default: true
- Values: true, false
- Description: Singularizes method names for single-resource endpoints, e.g. `retrieveQuote`.

### `server.methodNamePluralized`

- Required: false
- Default: true
- Values: true, false
- Description: Pluralizes method names for collection endpoints, e.g. `listQuotes`.

### `server.methodNameFromOperationId`

- Required: false
- Default: false
- Values: true, false
- Description: Derives method names from OpenAPI `operationId` instead of URL path.

## Configuration Snippets

### Client

#### Ktor

```kotlin
openapi2kotlin {
    inputSpec = "$projectDir/src/main/resources/openapi.yaml"
    outputDir = layout.buildDirectory.dir("generated/src/main/kotlin").get().asFile.path
    enabled = true

    model {
        packageName = "dev.openapi2kotlin.model"
        serialization = KotlinX
        validation = None
        double2BigDecimal = false
        float2BigDecimal = false
        integer2Long = true
    }

    client {
        packageName = "dev.openapi2kotlin.client"
        library = Ktor
        basePathVar = "basePath"
        methodNameSingularized = true
        methodNamePluralized = true
        methodNameFromOperationId = false
    }
}
```

#### Http4k

```kotlin
openapi2kotlin {
    inputSpec = "$projectDir/src/main/resources/openapi.yaml"
    outputDir = layout.buildDirectory.dir("generated/src/main/kotlin").get().asFile.path
    enabled = true

    model {
        packageName = "dev.openapi2kotlin.model"
        serialization = KotlinX
        validation = None
        double2BigDecimal = false
        float2BigDecimal = false
        integer2Long = true
    }

    client {
        packageName = "dev.openapi2kotlin.client"
        library = Http4k
        basePathVar = "basePath"
        methodNameSingularized = true
        methodNamePluralized = true
        methodNameFromOperationId = false
    }
}
```

#### RestClient

```kotlin
openapi2kotlin {
    inputSpec = "$projectDir/src/main/resources/openapi.yaml"
    outputDir = layout.buildDirectory.dir("generated/src/main/kotlin").get().asFile.path
    enabled = true

    model {
        packageName = "dev.openapi2kotlin.model"
        serialization = Jackson
        validation = None
        double2BigDecimal = false
        float2BigDecimal = false
        integer2Long = true
    }

    client {
        packageName = "dev.openapi2kotlin.client"
        library = RestClient
        basePathVar = "basePath"
        methodNameSingularized = true
        methodNamePluralized = true
        methodNameFromOperationId = false
    }
}
```

### Server

#### Ktor

```kotlin
openapi2kotlin {
    inputSpec = "$projectDir/src/main/resources/openapi.yaml"
    outputDir = layout.buildDirectory.dir("generated/src/main/kotlin").get().asFile.path
    enabled = true

    model {
        packageName = "dev.openapi2kotlin.model"
        serialization = KotlinX
        validation = None
        double2BigDecimal = false
        float2BigDecimal = false
        integer2Long = true
    }

    server {
        packageName = "dev.openapi2kotlin.server"
        library = Ktor
        swagger = false
        basePathVar = "basePath"
        methodNameSingularized = true
        methodNamePluralized = true
        methodNameFromOperationId = false
    }
}
```

#### Http4k

```kotlin
openapi2kotlin {
    inputSpec = "$projectDir/src/main/resources/openapi.yaml"
    outputDir = layout.buildDirectory.dir("generated/src/main/kotlin").get().asFile.path
    enabled = true

    model {
        packageName = "dev.openapi2kotlin.model"
        serialization = KotlinX
        validation = None
        double2BigDecimal = false
        float2BigDecimal = false
        integer2Long = true
    }

    server {
        packageName = "dev.openapi2kotlin.server"
        library = Http4k
        swagger = false
        basePathVar = "basePath"
        methodNameSingularized = true
        methodNamePluralized = true
        methodNameFromOperationId = false
    }
}
```

#### Spring

```kotlin
openapi2kotlin {
    inputSpec = "$projectDir/src/main/resources/openapi.yaml"
    outputDir = layout.buildDirectory.dir("generated/src/main/kotlin").get().asFile.path
    enabled = true

    model {
        packageName = "dev.openapi2kotlin.model"
        serialization = Jackson
        validation = None
        double2BigDecimal = false
        float2BigDecimal = false
        integer2Long = true
    }

    server {
        packageName = "dev.openapi2kotlin.server"
        library = Spring
        swagger = true
        basePathVar = "basePath"
        methodNameSingularized = true
        methodNamePluralized = true
        methodNameFromOperationId = false
    }
}
```

## External Links
- GitHub: https://github.com/openapi2kotlin/openapi2kotlin
- Maven Central: https://central.sonatype.com/artifact/dev.openapi2kotlin/openapi2kotlin
